description: John Zenon, an industrial painter, presents with right upper quadrant abdominal pain, profound fatigue, and mild jaundice after 72 hours of exposure to industrial degreasers and thinners containing toluene and carbon tetrachloride in a confined space. As the occupational health physician, document the acute toxic liver disease diagnosis in GNU Health. Log the adverse chemical exposure in his allergy/adverse reaction profile, order a hepatic monitoring lab panel (minimum 3 liver function tests), prescribe an antiemetic (e.g., Ondansetron) for nausea, and schedule a clinical reassessment follow-up in 3 to 7 days. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
